projectPlugins.name: AsyncLoadingScreen
projectPlugins.description: Allows you to configure a Loading Screen system in the project settings easily and automatically add a Loading Screen in your game whenever you open a new level.

projectPlugins.name: EOSIntegrationKit
projectPlugins.description: EIK (Epic Online Services Integration Kit) is a plugin that enables seamless integration between Epic Online Services (EOS) and Unreal Engine. The plugin provides access to the EOS SDK (Software Development Kit) within Unreal Engine, allowing developers to easily implement features such as matchmaking, achievements, leaderboards, and more.

projectPlugins.name: GF_CardSystem
projectPlugins.description: Game Feature plugin for the card-based ability system.

projectPlugins.name: GF_ChimeraBuilder
projectPlugins.description: Game Feature plugin for chimera construction and customization.

projectPlugins.name: GF_Combat
projectPlugins.description: Game Feature plugin for combat mechanics and resolution.

projectPlugins.name: GF_Dismemberment
projectPlugins.description: Game Feature plugin for chimera dismemberment, gore effects, and ChaosFlesh integration.

projectPlugins.name: GF_Environment
projectPlugins.description: Game Feature plugin for environmental hazards, arenas, and world state.

projectPlugins.name: GF_Traversal
projectPlugins.description: Tier-1 Game Feature plugin providing Chaos Mover 2.0 locomotion, quadruped/flight/burrowing movement modes, network prediction, and voxel terrain traversal for Colossus Rising.

projectPlugins.name: MatchDirector
projectPlugins.description: Game Feature plugin orchestrating the modular match gameplay loop: match lifecycle, pacing, dynamic AI intensity, spawning, and win-condition / reward resolution.

projectPlugins.name: PCGExtendedToolkit
projectPlugins.description: A rather large toolset that expand on existing PCG capabilities in unique ways.

projectPlugins.name: Voxel
projectPlugins.description: State-of-the-art voxel technology for Unreal Engine
